revision.comment: 鴨澤芹 がページ「[[宇賀神社]]」を「[[宇賀神社 (多古町飯笹)]]」に移動しました: 同名神社多数あり(ノートにて合意)
revision.text: #転送 [[宇賀神社 (多古町飯笹)]]

revision.comment: 曖昧さ回避ページにします。
revision.text:
'''宇賀神社'''（うがじんじゃ）は[[ウカノミタマ]]（宇迦之御魂神、倉稲魂命）若しくは[[宇賀神]]を祭神とする神社。 *青森県今別町山崎山元にある神社 *福島県南会津町田島宮本甲にある神社 - [[田出宇賀神社]] *千葉県香取市府馬にある神社 - [[府馬の大クス]]がある。 *千葉県多古町飯笹にある神社 - [[宇賀神社 (多古町飯笹)]] *神奈川県大磯町西小磯にある神社 *石川県羽咋市千里浜町にある神社 *京都府京都市南区東九条東札辻町にある神社 *香川県三豊市豊中町笠田笠岡にある神社 *徳島県鳴門市北灘町宿毛谷にある神社 - 伊宇賀神社 *愛媛県西条市壬生川にある神社 *高知県高知市長浜にある神社 *福岡県福岡市中央区大宮にある神社 *福岡県福岡市西区生の松原にある神社 - 下山門宇賀神社 *福岡県福岡市早良区小田部にある神社 - 将軍神社
{{デフォルトソート:うかしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

revision.comment: 追加
revision.text:
'''宇賀神社'''（うがじんじゃ）は[[ウカノミタマ]]（宇迦之御魂神、倉稲魂命）若しくは[[宇賀神]]を祭神とする神社。 *青森県[[今別町]]山崎山元にある神社 *福島県[[南会津町]]田島宮本甲にある神社 - [[田出宇賀神社]] *千葉県[[香取市]]府馬にある神社 - [[府馬の大クス]]がある。 *千葉県[[多古町]]飯笹にある神社 - [[宇賀神社 (多古町飯笹)]] *神奈川県[[大磯町]]西小磯にある神社 *長野県[[信濃町]][[野尻湖]]の琵琶島にある神社 *石川県[[羽咋市]]千里浜町にある神社 *京都府京都市南区東九条[[札辻通|東札辻町]]にある神社 *香川県[[三豊市]]豊中町笠田笠岡にある神社 *徳島県[[鳴門市]][[北灘町宿毛谷]]にある神社 - 伊宇賀神社 *愛媛県[[西条市]][[壬生川町|壬生川]]にある神社 *高知県[[高知市]]長浜にある神社 *福岡県福岡市中央区[[大宮 (福岡市)|大宮]]にある神社 *福岡県福岡市西区[[生の松原 (福岡市)|生の松原]]にある神社 - 下山門宇賀神社 *福岡県福岡市早良区[[小田部]]にある神社 - 将軍神社 *福岡県[[吉富町]]小犬丸にある神社 - 宇賀貴船神社
{{デフォルトソート:うかしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

'''宇賀神社'''（うがじんじゃ）は[[ウカノミタマ]]（宇迦之御魂神、倉稲魂命）若しくは[[宇賀神]]を祭神とする神社。 *青森県[[今別町]]山崎山元にある神社 *福島県[[南会津町]]田島宮本甲にある神社 - [[田出宇賀神社]] *千葉県[[香取市]]府馬にある神社 - [[府馬の大クス]]がある。 *千葉県[[多古町]]飯笹にある神社 - [[宇賀神社 (多古町飯笹)]] *神奈川県[[大磯町]]西小磯にある神社 *長野県[[信濃町]][[野尻湖]]の琵琶島にある神社 *石川県[[羽咋市]]千里浜町にある神社 *京都府京都市南区東九条[[札辻通|東札辻町]]にある神社 *香川県[[三豊市]][[豊中町 (香川県)|豊中町]]笠田笠岡にある神社 - どぶろく祭りで知られる。 *徳島県[[鳴門市]][[北灘町宿毛谷]]にある神社 - 伊宇賀神社 *愛媛県[[西条市]][[壬生川町|壬生川]]にある神社 *高知県[[高知市]]長浜にある神社 *福岡県福岡市中央区[[大宮 (福岡市)|大宮]]にある神社 *福岡県福岡市西区[[生の松原 (福岡市)|生の松原]]にある神社 - 下山門宇賀神社 *福岡県福岡市早良区[[小田部]]にある神社 - 将軍神社 *福岡県[[吉富町]]小犬丸にある神社 - 宇賀貴船神社
{{デフォルトソート:うかしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:refresh]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
'''宇賀神社'''（うがじんじゃ）は[[ウカノミタマ]]（宇迦之御魂神、倉稲魂命）若しくは[[宇賀神]]を祭神とする神社。 *青森県[[今別町]]山崎山元にある神社 *福島県[[南会津町]]田島宮本甲にある神社 - [[田出宇賀神社]] *千葉県[[香取市]]府馬にある神社 - [[府馬の大クス]]がある。 *千葉県[[多古町]]飯笹にある神社 - [[宇賀神社 (多古町飯笹)]] *神奈川県[[大磯町]]西小磯にある神社 *長野県[[信濃町 (代表的なトピック)|信濃町]][[野尻湖]]の琵琶島にある神社 *石川県[[羽咋市]]千里浜町にある神社 *京都府京都市南区東九条[[札辻通|東札辻町]]にある神社 *香川県[[三豊市]][[豊中町 (香川県)|豊中町]]笠田笠岡にある神社 - どぶろく祭りで知られる。 *徳島県[[鳴門市]][[北灘町宿毛谷]]にある神社 - 伊宇賀神社 *愛媛県[[西条市]][[壬生川町|壬生川]]にある神社 *高知県[[高知市]]長浜にある神社 *福岡県福岡市中央区[[大宮 (福岡市)|大宮]]にある神社 *福岡県福岡市西区[[生の松原 (福岡市)|生の松原]]にある神社 - 下山門宇賀神社 *福岡県福岡市早良区[[小田部]]にある神社 - 将軍神社 *福岡県[[吉富町]]小犬丸にある神社 - 宇賀貴船神社
{{Aimai}} {{デフォルトソート:うかしんしや}} [[Category:shinto shrines with the same name]][[ja:宇賀神社]][[category:kk]] [[Category:refresh]] [[simple:user:immanuelle/宇賀神社]]

'''Uga Shrine''' (宇賀神社, うがじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine dedicated to {{ill|Ukanomitama|ja|ウカノミタマ}} (宇迦之御魂神, 倉稲魂命) or {{ill|Ugajin|ja|宇賀神}}.
* A shrine located in Yamamoto, Yamakizaki, {{ill|Imabetsu Town|ja|今別町}}, {{ill|Aomori Prefecture|ja|青森県}}. * A shrine in Miyamoto Kō, {{ill|Tajima|ja|田島}}, {{ill|Minamiaizu Town|ja|南会津町}}, {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|ja|福島県}} - {{ill|Tade Uga Shrine|ja|田出宇賀神社}}. * A shrine in {{ill|Fuma|ja|府馬}}, {{ill|Katori City|ja|香取市}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|ja|千葉県}} - Known for the {{ill|Great Camphor Tree of Fuma|ja|府馬の大クス}}. * A shrine in Iizasa, {{ill|Tako Town|ja|多古町}}, Chiba Prefecture - {{ill|Uga Shrine (Tako Town, Iizasa)|ja|宇賀神社 (多古町飯笹)}}. * A shrine in Nishikoiso, {{ill|Ōiso Town|ja|大磯町}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}. * A shrine on Biwa Island in {{ill|Lake Nojiri|ja|野尻湖}}, {{ill|Shinanomachi|ja|信濃町}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}. * A shrine in Chirihama Town, {{ill|Hakui City|ja|羽咋市}}, {{ill|Ishikawa Prefecture|ja|石川県}}. * A shrine in Higashi Satsuzucho, Higashikujo, {{ill|Minami Ward, Kyoto|ja|南区}}, {{ill|Kyoto City|ja|京都市}}, {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|ja|京都府}}. * A shrine in Kasada Kasaoka, {{ill|Toyonaka Town (Mitoyo)|ja|豊中町}}, {{ill|Mitoyo City|ja|三豊市}}, {{ill|Kagawa Prefecture|ja|香川県}} - Known for the Doburoku Festival. * A shrine in Sukumo Valley, {{ill|Kitanada Town|ja|北灘町}}, {{ill|Naruto City|ja|鳴門市}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県}} - {{ill|Iuga Shrine|ja|伊宇賀神社}}. * A shrine in Nyūgawa, {{ill|Saijō City|ja|西条市}}, {{ill|Ehime Prefecture|ja|愛媛県}}. * A shrine in Nagahama, {{ill|Kōchi City|ja|高知市}}, {{ill|Kōchi Prefecture|ja|高知県}}. * A shrine in Ōmiya, {{ill|Chūō Ward, Fukuoka|ja|大宮 (福岡市)}}, {{ill|Fukuoka City|ja|福岡市}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}}. * A shrine in Ikino Matsubara, {{ill|Nishi Ward, Fukuoka|ja|生の松原 (福岡市)}}, Fukuoka City - Shimoyamato Uga Shrine. * A shrine in Kodabe, {{ill|Sawara Ward, Fukuoka|ja|小田部}}, Fukuoka City - Shōgun Shrine. * A shrine in Koinumaru, {{ill|Yoshitomi Town|ja|吉富町}}, Fukuoka Prefecture - Uga Kibune Shrine.
{{Disambiguation}} [[Category:Shrines with identical names]] [[Category:Original pages]] [[ja:宇賀神社]] [[Category:refresh]] [[simple:user:immanuelle/宇賀神社]]

revision.text:
'''Uga Shrine''' (宇賀神社, うがじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine dedicated to {{ill|Ukanomitama|ja|ウカノミタマ}} (宇迦之御魂神, 倉稲魂命) or {{ill|Ugajin|ja|宇賀神}}.
* A shrine located in Yamamoto, Yamakizaki, {{ill|Imabetsu Town|ja|今別町}}, {{ill|Aomori Prefecture|ja|青森県}}. * A shrine in Miyamoto Kō, {{ill|Tajima|ja|田島}}, {{ill|Minamiaizu Town|ja|南会津町}}, {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|ja|福島県}} - {{ill|Tade Uga Shrine|ja|田出宇賀神社}}. * A shrine in {{ill|Fuma|ja|府馬}}, {{ill|Katori City|ja|香取市}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|ja|千葉県}} - Known for the {{ill|Great Camphor Tree of Fuma|ja|府馬の大クス}}. * A shrine in Iizasa, {{ill|Tako Town|ja|多古町}}, Chiba Prefecture - {{ill|Uga Shrine (Tako Town, Iizasa)|ja|宇賀神社 (多古町飯笹)}}. * A shrine in Nishikoiso, {{ill|Ōiso Town|ja|大磯町}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}. * A shrine on Biwa Island in {{ill|Lake Nojiri|ja|野尻湖}}, {{ill|Shinanomachi|ja|信濃町}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}. * A shrine in Chirihama Town, {{ill|Hakui City|ja|羽咋市}}, {{ill|Ishikawa Prefecture|ja|石川県}}. * A shrine in Higashi Satsuzucho, Higashikujo, {{ill|Minami Ward, Kyoto|ja|南区}}, {{ill|Kyoto City|ja|京都市}}, {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|ja|京都府}}. * A shrine in Kasada Kasaoka, {{ill|Toyonaka Town (Mitoyo)|ja|豊中町}}, {{ill|Mitoyo City|ja|三豊市}}, {{ill|Kagawa Prefecture|ja|香川県}} - Known for the Doburoku Festival. * A shrine in Sukumo Valley, {{ill|Kitanada Town|ja|北灘町}}, {{ill|Naruto City|ja|鳴門市}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県}} - {{ill|Iuga Shrine|ja|伊宇賀神社}}. * A shrine in Nyūgawa, {{ill|Saijō City|ja|西条市}}, {{ill|Ehime Prefecture|ja|愛媛県}}. * A shrine in Nagahama, {{ill|Kōchi City|ja|高知市}}, {{ill|Kōchi Prefecture|ja|高知県}}. * A shrine in Ōmiya, {{ill|Chūō Ward, Fukuoka|ja|大宮 (福岡市)}}, {{ill|Fukuoka City|ja|福岡市}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}}. * A shrine in Ikino Matsubara, {{ill|Nishi Ward, Fukuoka|ja|生の松原 (福岡市)}}, Fukuoka City - Shimoyamato Uga Shrine. * A shrine in Kodabe, {{ill|Sawara Ward, Fukuoka|ja|小田部}}, Fukuoka City - Shōgun Shrine. * A shrine in Koinumaru, {{ill|Yoshitomi Town|ja|吉富町}}, Fukuoka Prefecture - Uga Kibune Shrine.

* A shrine located in Yamamoto, Yamakizaki, {{ill|Imabetsu Town|ja|今別町}}, {{ill|Aomori Prefecture|ja|青森県}}. * A shrine in Miyamoto Kō, {{ill|Tajima|ja|田島}}, {{ill|Minamiaizu Town|ja|南会津町}}, {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|ja|福島県}} - {{ill|Tade Uga Shrine|ja|田出宇賀神社}}. * A shrine in {{ill|Fuma|ja|府馬}}, {{ill|Katori City|ja|香取市}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|ja|千葉県}} - Known for the {{ill|Great Camphor Tree of Fuma|ja|府馬の大クス}}. * A shrine in Iizasa, {{ill|Tako Town|ja|多古町}}, Chiba Prefecture - {{ill|Uga Shrine (Tako Town, Iizasa)|ja|宇賀神社 (多古町飯笹)}}. * A shrine in Nishikoiso, {{ill|Ōiso Town|ja|大磯町}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}. * A shrine on Biwa Island in {{ill|Lake Nojiri|ja|野尻湖}}, {{ill|Shinanomachi|ja|信濃町}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}. * A shrine in Chirihama Town, {{ill|Hakui City|ja|羽咋市}}, {{ill|Ishikawa Prefecture|ja|石川県}}. * A shrine in Higashi Satsuzucho, Higashikujo, {{ill|Minami Ward, Kyoto|ja|南区}}, {{ill|Kyoto City|ja|京都市}}, {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|ja|京都府}}. * A shrine in Kasada Kasaoka, {{ill|Toyonaka Town (Mitoyo)|ja|豊中町}}, {{ill|Mitoyo City|ja|三豊市}}, {{ill|Kagawa Prefecture|ja|香川県}} - Known for the Doburoku Festival. * A shrine in Sukumo Valley, {{ill|Kitanada Town|ja|北灘町}}, {{ill|Naruto City|ja|鳴門市}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県}} - {{ill|Iuga Shrine|ja|伊宇賀神社}}. * A shrine in Nyūgawa, {{ill|Saijō City|ja|西条市}}, {{ill|Ehime Prefecture|ja|愛媛県}}. * A shrine in Nagahama, {{ill|Kōchi City|ja|高知市}}, {{ill|Kōchi Prefecture|ja|高知県}}. * A shrine in Ōmiya, {{ill|Chūō Ward, Fukuoka|ja|大宮 (福岡市)}}, {{ill|Fukuoka City|ja|福岡市}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}}. * A shrine in Ikino Matsubara, {{ill|Nishi Ward, Fukuoka|ja|生の松原 (福岡市)}}, Fukuoka City - Shimoyamato Uga Shrine. * A shrine in Kodabe, {{ill|Sawara Ward, Fukuoka|ja|小田部}}, Fukuoka City - Shōgun Shrine. * A shrine in Koinumaru, {{ill|Yoshitomi Town|ja|吉富町}}, Fukuoka Prefecture - Uga Kibune Shrine.

'''Uga Shrine''' (宇賀神社, うがじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine dedicated to {{ill|Ukanomitama|ja|ウカノミタマ}} (宇迦之御魂神, 倉稲魂命) or {{ill|Ugajin|ja|宇賀神}}.
* A shrine located in Yamamoto, Yamakizaki, {{ill|Imabetsu Town|ja|今別町}}, {{ill|Aomori Prefecture|ja|青森県}}. * A shrine in Miyamoto Kō, {{ill|Tajima|ja|田島}}, {{ill|Minamiaizu Town|ja|南会津町}}, {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|ja|福島県}} - {{ill|Tade Uga Shrine|ja|田出宇賀神社}}. * A shrine in {{ill|Fuma|ja|府馬}}, {{ill|Katori City|ja|香取市}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|ja|千葉県}} - Known for the {{ill|Great Camphor Tree of Fuma|ja|府馬の大クス}}. * A shrine in Iizasa, {{ill|Tako Town|ja|多古町}}, Chiba Prefecture - {{ill|Uga Shrine (Tako Town, Iizasa)|ja|宇賀神社 (多古町飯笹)}}. * A shrine in Nishikoiso, {{ill|Ōiso Town|ja|大磯町}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}. * A shrine on Biwa Island in {{ill|Lake Nojiri|ja|野尻湖}}, {{ill|Shinanomachi|ja|信濃町}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}. * A shrine in Chirihama Town, {{ill|Hakui City|ja|羽咋市}}, {{ill|Ishikawa Prefecture|ja|石川県}}. * A shrine in Higashi Satsuzucho, Higashikujo, {{ill|Minami Ward, Kyoto|ja|南区}}, {{ill|Kyoto City|ja|京都市}}, {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|ja|京都府}}. * A shrine in Kasada Kasaoka, {{ill|Toyonaka Town (Mitoyo)|ja|豊中町}}, {{ill|Mitoyo City|ja|三豊市}}, {{ill|Kagawa Prefecture|ja|香川県}} - Known for the Doburoku Festival. * A shrine in Sukumo Valley, {{ill|Kitanada Town|ja|北灘町}}, {{ill|Naruto City|ja|鳴門市}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県}} - {{ill|Iuga Shrine|ja|伊宇賀神社}}. * A shrine in Nyūgawa, {{ill|Saijō City|ja|西条市}}, {{ill|Ehime Prefecture|ja|愛媛県}}. * A shrine in Nagahama, {{ill|Kōchi City|ja|高知市}}, {{ill|Kōchi Prefecture|ja|高知県}}. * A shrine in Ōmiya, {{ill|Chūō Ward, Fukuoka|ja|大宮 (福岡市)}}, {{ill|Fukuoka City|ja|福岡市}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}}. * A shrine in Ikino Matsubara, {{ill|Nishi Ward, Fukuoka|ja|生の松原 (福岡市)}}, Fukuoka City - Shimoyamato Uga Shrine. * A shrine in Kodabe, {{ill|Sawara Ward, Fukuoka|ja|小田部}}, Fukuoka City - Shōgun Shrine. * A shrine in Koinumaru, {{ill|Yoshitomi Town|ja|吉富町}}, Fukuoka Prefecture - Uga Kibune Shrine.

'''Uga Shrine''' (宇賀神社, うがじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine dedicated to {{ill|Ukanomitama|ja|ウカノミタマ}} (宇迦之御魂神, 倉稲魂命) or {{ill|Ugajin|ja|宇賀神}}.
* A shrine located in Yamamoto, Yamakizaki, {{ill|Imabetsu Town|ja|今別町}}, {{ill|Aomori Prefecture|ja|青森県}}. * A shrine in Miyamoto Kō, {{ill|Tajima|ja|田島}}, {{ill|Minamiaizu Town|ja|南会津町}}, {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|ja|福島県}} - {{ill|Tade Uga Shrine|ja|田出宇賀神社}}. * A shrine in {{ill|Fuma|ja|府馬}}, {{ill|Katori City|ja|香取市}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|ja|千葉県}} - Known for the {{ill|Great Camphor Tree of Fuma|ja|府馬の大クス}}. * A shrine in Iizasa, {{ill|Tako Town|ja|多古町}}, Chiba Prefecture - {{ill|Uga Shrine (Tako Town, Iizasa)|ja|宇賀神社 (多古町飯笹)}}. * A shrine in Nishikoiso, {{ill|Ōiso Town|ja|大磯町}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}. * A shrine on Biwa Island in {{ill|Lake Nojiri|ja|野尻湖}}, {{ill|Shinanomachi|ja|信濃町}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}. * A shrine in Chirihama Town, {{ill|Hakui City|ja|羽咋市}}, {{ill|Ishikawa Prefecture|ja|石川県}}. * A shrine in Higashi Satsuzucho, Higashikujo, {{ill|Minami Ward, Kyoto|ja|南区}}, {{ill|Kyoto City|ja|京都市}}, {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|ja|京都府}}. * A shrine in Kasada Kasaoka, {{ill|Toyonaka Town (Mitoyo)|ja|豊中町}}, {{ill|Mitoyo City|ja|三豊市}}, {{ill|Kagawa Prefecture|ja|香川県}} - Known for the Doburoku Festival. * A shrine in Sukumo Valley, {{ill|Kitanada Town|ja|北灘町}}, {{ill|Naruto City|ja|鳴門市}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県}} - {{ill|Iuga Shrine|ja|伊宇賀神社}}. * A shrine in Nyūgawa, {{ill|Saijō City|ja|西条市}}, {{ill|Ehime Prefecture|ja|愛媛県}}. * A shrine in Nagahama, {{ill|Kōchi City|ja|高知市}}, {{ill|Kōchi Prefecture|ja|高知県}}. * A shrine in Ōmiya, {{ill|Chūō Ward, Fukuoka|ja|大宮 (福岡市)}}, {{ill|Fukuoka City|ja|福岡市}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}}. * A shrine in Ikino Matsubara, {{ill|Nishi Ward, Fukuoka|ja|生の松原 (福岡市)}}, Fukuoka City - Shimoyamato Uga Shrine. * A shrine in Kodabe, {{ill|Sawara Ward, Fukuoka|ja|小田部}}, Fukuoka City - Shōgun Shrine. * A shrine in Koinumaru, {{ill|Yoshitomi Town|ja|吉富町}}, Fukuoka Prefecture - Uga Kibune Shrine.

* A shrine located in Yamamoto, Yamakizaki, {{ill|Imabetsu Town|ja|今別町}}, {{ill|Aomori Prefecture|ja|青森県}}. * A shrine in Miyamoto Kō, {{ill|Tajima|ja|田島}}, {{ill|Minamiaizu Town|ja|南会津町}}, {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|ja|福島県}} - {{ill|Tade Uga Shrine|ja|田出宇賀神社}}. * A shrine in {{ill|Fuma|ja|府馬}}, {{ill|Katori City|ja|香取市}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|ja|千葉県}} - Known for the {{ill|Great Camphor Tree of Fuma|ja|府馬の大クス}}. * A shrine in Iizasa, {{ill|Tako Town|ja|多古町}}, Chiba Prefecture - {{ill|Uga Shrine (Tako Town, Iizasa)|ja|宇賀神社 (多古町飯笹)}}. * A shrine in Nishikoiso, {{ill|Ōiso Town|ja|大磯町}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}. * A shrine on Biwa Island in {{ill|Lake Nojiri|ja|野尻湖}}, {{ill|Shinanomachi|ja|信濃町}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}. * A shrine in Chirihama Town, {{ill|Hakui City|ja|羽咋市}}, {{ill|Ishikawa Prefecture|ja|石川県}}. * A shrine in Higashi Satsuzucho, Higashikujo, {{ill|Minami Ward, Kyoto|ja|南区}}, {{ill|Kyoto City|ja|京都市}}, {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|ja|京都府}}. * A shrine in Kasada Kasaoka, {{ill|Toyonaka Town (Mitoyo)|ja|豊中町}}, {{ill|Mitoyo City|ja|三豊市}}, {{ill|Kagawa Prefecture|ja|香川県}} - Known for the Doburoku Festival. * A shrine in Sukumo Valley, {{ill|Kitanada Town|ja|北灘町}}, {{ill|Naruto City|ja|鳴門市}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県}} - {{ill|Iuga Shrine|ja|伊宇賀神社}}. * A shrine in Nyūgawa, {{ill|Saijō City|ja|西条市}}, {{ill|Ehime Prefecture|ja|愛媛県}}. * A shrine in Nagahama, {{ill|Kōchi City|ja|高知市}}, {{ill|Kōchi Prefecture|ja|高知県}}. * A shrine in Ōmiya, {{ill|Chūō Ward, Fukuoka|ja|大宮 (福岡市)}}, {{ill|Fukuoka City|ja|福岡市}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}}. * A shrine in Ikino Matsubara, {{ill|Nishi Ward, Fukuoka|ja|生の松原 (福岡市)}}, Fukuoka City - Shimoyamato Uga Shrine. * A shrine in Kodabe, {{ill|Sawara Ward, Fukuoka|ja|小田部}}, Fukuoka City - Shōgun Shrine. * A shrine in Koinumaru, {{ill|Yoshitomi Town|ja|吉富町}}, Fukuoka Prefecture - Uga Kibune Shrine.

* A shrine located in Yamamoto, Yamakizaki, {{ill|Imabetsu Town|ja|今別町}}, {{ill|Aomori Prefecture|ja|青森県}}. * A shrine in Miyamoto Kō, {{ill|Tajima|ja|田島}}, {{ill|Minamiaizu Town|ja|南会津町}}, {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|ja|福島県}} - {{ill|Tade Uga Shrine|ja|田出宇賀神社}}. * A shrine in {{ill|Fuma|ja|府馬}}, {{ill|Katori City|ja|香取市}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|ja|千葉県}} - Known for the {{ill|Great Camphor Tree of Fuma|ja|府馬の大クス}}. * A shrine in Iizasa, {{ill|Tako Town|ja|多古町}}, Chiba Prefecture - {{ill|Uga Shrine (Tako Town, Iizasa)|ja|宇賀神社 (多古町飯笹)}}. * A shrine in Nishikoiso, {{ill|Ōiso Town|ja|大磯町}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}. * A shrine on Biwa Island in {{ill|Lake Nojiri|ja|野尻湖}}, {{ill|Shinanomachi|ja|信濃町}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}. * A shrine in Chirihama Town, {{ill|Hakui City|ja|羽咋市}}, {{ill|Ishikawa Prefecture|ja|石川県}}. * A shrine in Higashi Satsuzucho, Higashikujo, {{ill|Minami Ward, Kyoto|ja|南区}}, {{ill|Kyoto City|ja|京都市}}, {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|ja|京都府}}. * A shrine in Kasada Kasaoka, {{ill|Toyonaka Town (Mitoyo)|ja|豊中町}}, {{ill|Mitoyo City|ja|三豊市}}, {{ill|Kagawa Prefecture|ja|香川県}} - Known for the Doburoku Festival. * A shrine in Sukumo Valley, {{ill|Kitanada Town|ja|北灘町}}, {{ill|Naruto City|ja|鳴門市}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県}} - {{ill|Iuga Shrine|ja|伊宇賀神社}}. * A shrine in Nyūgawa, {{ill|Saijō City|ja|西条市}}, {{ill|Ehime Prefecture|ja|愛媛県}}. * A shrine in Nagahama, {{ill|Kōchi City|ja|高知市}}, {{ill|Kōchi Prefecture|ja|高知県}}. * A shrine in Ōmiya, {{ill|Chūō Ward, Fukuoka|ja|大宮 (福岡市)}}, {{ill|Fukuoka City|ja|福岡市}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}}. * A shrine in Ikino Matsubara, {{ill|Nishi Ward, Fukuoka|ja|生の松原 (福岡市)}}, Fukuoka City - Shimoyamato Uga Shrine. * A shrine in Kodabe, {{ill|Sawara Ward, Fukuoka|ja|小田部}}, Fukuoka City - Shōgun Shrine. * A shrine in Koinumaru, {{ill|Yoshitomi Town|ja|吉富町}}, Fukuoka Prefecture - Uga Kibune Shrine.

* A shrine located in Yamamoto, Yamakizaki, {{ill|Imabetsu Town|ja|今別町}}, {{ill|Aomori Prefecture|ja|青森県}}. * A shrine in Miyamoto Kō, {{ill|Tajima|ja|田島}}, {{ill|Minamiaizu Town|ja|南会津町}}, {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|ja|福島県}} - {{ill|Tade Uga Shrine|ja|田出宇賀神社}}. * A shrine in {{ill|Fuma|ja|府馬}}, {{ill|Katori City|ja|香取市}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|ja|千葉県}} - Known for the {{ill|Great Camphor Tree of Fuma|ja|府馬の大クス}}. * A shrine in Iizasa, {{ill|Tako Town|ja|多古町}}, Chiba Prefecture - {{ill|Uga Shrine (Tako Town, Iizasa)|ja|宇賀神社 (多古町飯笹)}}. * A shrine in Nishikoiso, {{ill|Ōiso Town|ja|大磯町}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}. * A shrine on Biwa Island in {{ill|Lake Nojiri|ja|野尻湖}}, {{ill|Shinanomachi|ja|信濃町}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}. * A shrine in Chirihama Town, {{ill|Hakui City|ja|羽咋市}}, {{ill|Ishikawa Prefecture|ja|石川県}}. * A shrine in Higashi Satsuzucho, Higashikujo, {{ill|Minami Ward, Kyoto|ja|南区}}, {{ill|Kyoto City|ja|京都市}}, {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|ja|京都府}}. * A shrine in Kasada Kasaoka, {{ill|Toyonaka Town (Mitoyo)|ja|豊中町}}, {{ill|Mitoyo City|ja|三豊市}}, {{ill|Kagawa Prefecture|ja|香川県}} - Known for the Doburoku Festival. * A shrine in Sukumo Valley, {{ill|Kitanada Town|ja|北灘町}}, {{ill|Naruto City|ja|鳴門市}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県}} - {{ill|Iuga Shrine|ja|伊宇賀神社}}. * A shrine in Nyūgawa, {{ill|Saijō City|ja|西条市}}, {{ill|Ehime Prefecture|ja|愛媛県}}. * A shrine in Nagahama, {{ill|Kōchi City|ja|高知市}}, {{ill|Kōchi Prefecture|ja|高知県}}. * A shrine in Ōmiya, {{ill|Chūō Ward, Fukuoka|ja|大宮 (福岡市)}}, {{ill|Fukuoka City|ja|福岡市}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}}. * A shrine in Ikino Matsubara, {{ill|Nishi Ward, Fukuoka|ja|生の松原 (福岡市)}}, Fukuoka City - Shimoyamato Uga Shrine. * A shrine in Kodabe, {{ill|Sawara Ward, Fukuoka|ja|小田部}}, Fukuoka City - Shōgun Shrine. * A shrine in Koinumaru, {{ill|Yoshitomi Town|ja|吉富町}}, Fukuoka Prefecture - Uga Kibune Shrine.

revision.text:
'''Uga Shrine''' (宇賀神社, うがじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine dedicated to {{ill|Ukanomitama|ja|ウカノミタマ}} (宇迦之御魂神, 倉稲魂命) or {{ill|Ugajin|ja|宇賀神}}.
* A shrine located in Yamamoto, Yamakizaki, {{ill|Imabetsu Town|ja|今別町}}, {{ill|Aomori Prefecture|ja|青森県}}. * A shrine in Miyamoto Kō, {{ill|Tajima|ja|田島}}, {{ill|Minamiaizu Town|ja|南会津町}}, {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|ja|福島県}} - {{ill|Tade Uga Shrine|ja|田出宇賀神社}}. * A shrine in {{ill|Fuma|ja|府馬}}, {{ill|Katori City|ja|香取市}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|ja|千葉県}} - Known for the {{ill|Great Camphor Tree of Fuma|ja|府馬の大クス}}. * A shrine in Iizasa, {{ill|Tako Town|ja|多古町}}, Chiba Prefecture - {{ill|Uga Shrine (Tako Town, Iizasa)|ja|宇賀神社 (多古町飯笹)}}. * A shrine in Nishikoiso, {{ill|Ōiso Town|ja|大磯町}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}. * A shrine on Biwa Island in {{ill|Lake Nojiri|ja|野尻湖}}, {{ill|Shinanomachi|ja|信濃町}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}. * A shrine in Chirihama Town, {{ill|Hakui City|ja|羽咋市}}, {{ill|Ishikawa Prefecture|ja|石川県}}. * A shrine in Higashi Satsuzucho, Higashikujo, {{ill|Minami Ward, Kyoto|ja|南区}}, {{ill|Kyoto City|ja|京都市}}, {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|ja|京都府}}. * A shrine in Kasada Kasaoka, {{ill|Toyonaka Town (Mitoyo)|ja|豊中町}}, {{ill|Mitoyo City|ja|三豊市}}, {{ill|Kagawa Prefecture|ja|香川県}} - Known for the Doburoku Festival. * A shrine in Sukumo Valley, {{ill|Kitanada Town|ja|北灘町}}, {{ill|Naruto City|ja|鳴門市}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県}} - {{ill|Iuga Shrine|ja|伊宇賀神社}}. * A shrine in Nyūgawa, {{ill|Saijō City|ja|西条市}}, {{ill|Ehime Prefecture|ja|愛媛県}}. * A shrine in Nagahama, {{ill|Kōchi City|ja|高知市}}, {{ill|Kōchi Prefecture|ja|高知県}}. * A shrine in Ōmiya, {{ill|Chūō Ward, Fukuoka|ja|大宮 (福岡市)}}, {{ill|Fukuoka City|ja|福岡市}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}}. * A shrine in Ikino Matsubara, {{ill|Nishi Ward, Fukuoka|ja|生の松原 (福岡市)}}, Fukuoka City - Shimoyamato Uga Shrine. * A shrine in Kodabe, {{ill|Sawara Ward, Fukuoka|ja|小田部}}, Fukuoka City - Shōgun Shrine. * A shrine in Koinumaru, {{ill|Yoshitomi Town|ja|吉富町}}, Fukuoka Prefecture - Uga Kibune Shrine.

'''Uga Shrine''' (宇賀神社, うがじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine dedicated to {{ill|Ukanomitama|ja|ウカノミタマ}} (宇迦之御魂神, 倉稲魂命) or {{ill|Ugajin|ja|宇賀神}}.
* A shrine located in Yamamoto, Yamakizaki, {{ill|Imabetsu Town|ja|今別町}}, {{ill|Aomori Prefecture|ja|青森県}}. * A shrine in Miyamoto Kō, {{ill|Tajima|ja|田島}}, {{ill|Minamiaizu Town|ja|南会津町}}, {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|ja|福島県}} - {{ill|Tade Uga Shrine|ja|田出宇賀神社}}. * A shrine in {{ill|Fuma|ja|府馬}}, {{ill|Katori City|ja|香取市}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|ja|千葉県}} - Known for the {{ill|Great Camphor Tree of Fuma|ja|府馬の大クス}}. * A shrine in Iizasa, {{ill|Tako Town|ja|多古町}}, Chiba Prefecture - {{ill|Uga Shrine (Tako Town, Iizasa)|ja|宇賀神社 (多古町飯笹)}}. * A shrine in Nishikoiso, {{ill|Ōiso Town|ja|大磯町}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}. * A shrine on Biwa Island in {{ill|Lake Nojiri|ja|野尻湖}}, {{ill|Shinanomachi|ja|信濃町}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}. * A shrine in Chirihama Town, {{ill|Hakui City|ja|羽咋市}}, {{ill|Ishikawa Prefecture|ja|石川県}}. * A shrine in Higashi Satsuzucho, Higashikujo, {{ill|Minami Ward, Kyoto|ja|南区}}, {{ill|Kyoto City|ja|京都市}}, {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|ja|京都府}}. * A shrine in Kasada Kasaoka, {{ill|Toyonaka Town (Mitoyo)|ja|豊中町}}, {{ill|Mitoyo City|ja|三豊市}}, {{ill|Kagawa Prefecture|ja|香川県}} - Known for the Doburoku Festival. * A shrine in Sukumo Valley, {{ill|Kitanada Town|ja|北灘町}}, {{ill|Naruto City|ja|鳴門市}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県}} - {{ill|Iuga Shrine|ja|伊宇賀神社}}. * A shrine in Nyūgawa, {{ill|Saijō City|ja|西条市}}, {{ill|Ehime Prefecture|ja|愛媛県}}. * A shrine in Nagahama, {{ill|Kōchi City|ja|高知市}}, {{ill|Kōchi Prefecture|ja|高知県}}. * A shrine in Ōmiya, {{ill|Chūō Ward, Fukuoka|ja|大宮 (福岡市)}}, {{ill|Fukuoka City|ja|福岡市}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}}. * A shrine in Ikino Matsubara, {{ill|Nishi Ward, Fukuoka|ja|生の松原 (福岡市)}}, Fukuoka City - Shimoyamato Uga Shrine. * A shrine in Kodabe, {{ill|Sawara Ward, Fukuoka|ja|小田部}}, Fukuoka City - Shōgun Shrine. * A shrine in Koinumaru, {{ill|Yoshitomi Town|ja|吉富町}}, Fukuoka Prefecture - Uga Kibune Shrine.

'''Uga Shrine''' (宇賀神社, うがじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine dedicated to {{ill|Ukanomitama|ja|ウカノミタマ}} (宇迦之御魂神, 倉稲魂命) or {{ill|Ugajin|ja|宇賀神}}.
* A shrine located in Yamamoto, Yamakizaki, {{ill|Imabetsu Town|ja|今別町}}, {{ill|Aomori Prefecture|ja|青森県}}. * A shrine in Miyamoto Kō, {{ill|Tajima|ja|田島}}, {{ill|Minamiaizu Town|ja|南会津町}}, {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|ja|福島県}} - {{ill|Tade Uga Shrine|ja|田出宇賀神社}}. * A shrine in {{ill|Fuma|ja|府馬}}, {{ill|Katori City|ja|香取市}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|ja|千葉県}} - Known for the {{ill|Great Camphor Tree of Fuma|ja|府馬の大クス}}. * A shrine in Iizasa, {{ill|Tako Town|ja|多古町}}, Chiba Prefecture - {{ill|Uga Shrine (Tako Town, Iizasa)|ja|宇賀神社 (多古町飯笹)}}. * A shrine in Nishikoiso, {{ill|Ōiso Town|ja|大磯町}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}. * A shrine on Biwa Island in {{ill|Lake Nojiri|ja|野尻湖}}, {{ill|Shinanomachi|ja|信濃町}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}. * A shrine in Chirihama Town, {{ill|Hakui City|ja|羽咋市}}, {{ill|Ishikawa Prefecture|ja|石川県}}. * A shrine in Higashi Satsuzucho, Higashikujo, {{ill|Minami Ward, Kyoto|ja|南区}}, {{ill|Kyoto City|ja|京都市}}, {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|ja|京都府}}. * A shrine in Kasada Kasaoka, {{ill|Toyonaka Town (Mitoyo)|ja|豊中町}}, {{ill|Mitoyo City|ja|三豊市}}, {{ill|Kagawa Prefecture|ja|香川県}} - Known for the Doburoku Festival. * A shrine in Sukumo Valley, {{ill|Kitanada Town|ja|北灘町}}, {{ill|Naruto City|ja|鳴門市}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県}} - {{ill|Iuga Shrine|ja|伊宇賀神社}}. * A shrine in Nyūgawa, {{ill|Saijō City|ja|西条市}}, {{ill|Ehime Prefecture|ja|愛媛県}}. * A shrine in Nagahama, {{ill|Kōchi City|ja|高知市}}, {{ill|Kōchi Prefecture|ja|高知県}}. * A shrine in Ōmiya, {{ill|Chūō Ward, Fukuoka|ja|大宮 (福岡市)}}, {{ill|Fukuoka City|ja|福岡市}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}}. * A shrine in Ikino Matsubara, {{ill|Nishi Ward, Fukuoka|ja|生の松原 (福岡市)}}, Fukuoka City - Shimoyamato Uga Shrine. * A shrine in Kodabe, {{ill|Sawara Ward, Fukuoka|ja|小田部}}, Fukuoka City - Shōgun Shrine. * A shrine in Koinumaru, {{ill|Yoshitomi Town|ja|吉富町}}, Fukuoka Prefecture - Uga Kibune Shrine.

'''Uga Shrine''' (宇賀神社, うがじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine dedicated to {{ill|Ukanomitama|ja|ウカノミタマ}} (宇迦之御魂神, 倉稲魂命) or {{ill|Ugajin|ja|宇賀神}}.
* A shrine located in Yamamoto, Yamakizaki, {{ill|Imabetsu Town|ja|今別町}}, {{ill|Aomori Prefecture|ja|青森県}}. * A shrine in Miyamoto Kō, {{ill|Tajima|ja|田島}}, {{ill|Minamiaizu Town|ja|南会津町}}, {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|ja|福島県}} - {{ill|Tade Uga Shrine|ja|田出宇賀神社}}. * A shrine in {{ill|Fuma|ja|府馬}}, {{ill|Katori City|ja|香取市}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|ja|千葉県}} - Known for the {{ill|Great Camphor Tree of Fuma|ja|府馬の大クス}}. * A shrine in Iizasa, {{ill|Tako Town|ja|多古町}}, Chiba Prefecture - {{ill|Uga Shrine (Tako Town, Iizasa)|ja|宇賀神社 (多古町飯笹)}}. * A shrine in Nishikoiso, {{ill|Ōiso Town|ja|大磯町}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}. * A shrine on Biwa Island in {{ill|Lake Nojiri|ja|野尻湖}}, {{ill|Shinanomachi|ja|信濃町}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}. * A shrine in Chirihama Town, {{ill|Hakui City|ja|羽咋市}}, {{ill|Ishikawa Prefecture|ja|石川県}}. * A shrine in Higashi Satsuzucho, Higashikujo, {{ill|Minami Ward, Kyoto|ja|南区}}, {{ill|Kyoto City|ja|京都市}}, {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|ja|京都府}}. * A shrine in Kasada Kasaoka, {{ill|Toyonaka Town (Mitoyo)|ja|豊中町}}, {{ill|Mitoyo City|ja|三豊市}}, {{ill|Kagawa Prefecture|ja|香川県}} - Known for the Doburoku Festival. * A shrine in Sukumo Valley, {{ill|Kitanada Town|ja|北灘町}}, {{ill|Naruto City|ja|鳴門市}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県}} - {{ill|Iuga Shrine|ja|伊宇賀神社}}. * A shrine in Nyūgawa, {{ill|Saijō City|ja|西条市}}, {{ill|Ehime Prefecture|ja|愛媛県}}. * A shrine in Nagahama, {{ill|Kōchi City|ja|高知市}}, {{ill|Kōchi Prefecture|ja|高知県}}. * A shrine in Ōmiya, {{ill|Chūō Ward, Fukuoka|ja|大宮 (福岡市)}}, {{ill|Fukuoka City|ja|福岡市}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}}. * A shrine in Ikino Matsubara, {{ill|Nishi Ward, Fukuoka|ja|生の松原 (福岡市)}}, Fukuoka City - Shimoyamato Uga Shrine. * A shrine in Kodabe, {{ill|Sawara Ward, Fukuoka|ja|小田部}}, Fukuoka City - Shōgun Shrine. * A shrine in Koinumaru, {{ill|Yoshitomi Town|ja|吉富町}}, Fukuoka Prefecture - Uga Kibune Shrine.

'''Uga Shrine''' (宇賀神社, うがじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine dedicated to {{ill|Ukanomitama|ja|ウカノミタマ}} (宇迦之御魂神, 倉稲魂命) or {{ill|Ugajin|ja|宇賀神}}.
* A shrine located in Yamamoto, Yamakizaki, {{ill|Imabetsu Town|ja|今別町}}, {{ill|Aomori Prefecture|ja|青森県}}. * A shrine in Miyamoto Kō, {{ill|Tajima|ja|田島}}, {{ill|Minamiaizu Town|ja|南会津町}}, {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|ja|福島県}} - {{ill|Tade Uga Shrine|ja|田出宇賀神社}}. * A shrine in {{ill|Fuma|ja|府馬}}, {{ill|Katori City|ja|香取市}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|ja|千葉県}} - Known for the {{ill|Great Camphor Tree of Fuma|ja|府馬の大クス}}. * A shrine in Iizasa, {{ill|Tako Town|ja|多古町}}, Chiba Prefecture - {{ill|Uga Shrine (Tako Town, Iizasa)|ja|宇賀神社 (多古町飯笹)}}. * A shrine in Nishikoiso, {{ill|Ōiso Town|ja|大磯町}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}. * A shrine on Biwa Island in {{ill|Lake Nojiri|ja|野尻湖}}, {{ill|Shinanomachi|ja|信濃町}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}. * A shrine in Chirihama Town, {{ill|Hakui City|ja|羽咋市}}, {{ill|Ishikawa Prefecture|ja|石川県}}. * A shrine in Higashi Satsuzucho, Higashikujo, {{ill|Minami Ward, Kyoto|ja|南区}}, {{ill|Kyoto City|ja|京都市}}, {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|ja|京都府}}. * A shrine in Kasada Kasaoka, {{ill|Toyonaka Town (Mitoyo)|ja|豊中町}}, {{ill|Mitoyo City|ja|三豊市}}, {{ill|Kagawa Prefecture|ja|香川県}} - Known for the Doburoku Festival. * A shrine in Sukumo Valley, {{ill|Kitanada Town|ja|北灘町}}, {{ill|Naruto City|ja|鳴門市}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県}} - {{ill|Iuga Shrine|ja|伊宇賀神社}}. * A shrine in Nyūgawa, {{ill|Saijō City|ja|西条市}}, {{ill|Ehime Prefecture|ja|愛媛県}}. * A shrine in Nagahama, {{ill|Kōchi City|ja|高知市}}, {{ill|Kōchi Prefecture|ja|高知県}}. * A shrine in Ōmiya, {{ill|Chūō Ward, Fukuoka|ja|大宮 (福岡市)}}, {{ill|Fukuoka City|ja|福岡市}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}}. * A shrine in Ikino Matsubara, {{ill|Nishi Ward, Fukuoka|ja|生の松原 (福岡市)}}, Fukuoka City - Shimoyamato Uga Shrine. * A shrine in Kodabe, {{ill|Sawara Ward, Fukuoka|ja|小田部}}, Fukuoka City - Shōgun Shrine. * A shrine in Koinumaru, {{ill|Yoshitomi Town|ja|吉富町}}, Fukuoka Prefecture - Uga Kibune Shrine.

'''Uga Shrine''' (宇賀神社, うがじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine dedicated to {{ill|Ukanomitama|ja|ウカノミタマ}} (宇迦之御魂神, 倉稲魂命) or {{ill|Ugajin|ja|宇賀神}}.
* A shrine located in Yamamoto, Yamakizaki, {{ill|Imabetsu Town|ja|今別町}}, {{ill|Aomori Prefecture|ja|青森県}}. * A shrine in Miyamoto Kō, {{ill|Tajima|ja|田島}}, {{ill|Minamiaizu Town|ja|南会津町}}, {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|ja|福島県}} - {{ill|Tade Uga Shrine|ja|田出宇賀神社}}. * A shrine in {{ill|Fuma|ja|府馬}}, {{ill|Katori City|ja|香取市}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|ja|千葉県}} - Known for the {{ill|Great Camphor Tree of Fuma|ja|府馬の大クス}}. * A shrine in Iizasa, {{ill|Tako Town|ja|多古町}}, Chiba Prefecture - {{ill|Uga Shrine (Tako Town, Iizasa)|ja|宇賀神社 (多古町飯笹)}}. * A shrine in Nishikoiso, {{ill|Ōiso Town|ja|大磯町}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}. * A shrine on Biwa Island in {{ill|Lake Nojiri|ja|野尻湖}}, {{ill|Shinanomachi|ja|信濃町}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}. * A shrine in Chirihama Town, {{ill|Hakui City|ja|羽咋市}}, {{ill|Ishikawa Prefecture|ja|石川県}}. * A shrine in Higashi Satsuzucho, Higashikujo, {{ill|Minami Ward, Kyoto|ja|南区}}, {{ill|Kyoto City|ja|京都市}}, {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|ja|京都府}}. * A shrine in Kasada Kasaoka, {{ill|Toyonaka Town (Mitoyo)|ja|豊中町}}, {{ill|Mitoyo City|ja|三豊市}}, {{ill|Kagawa Prefecture|ja|香川県}} - Known for the Doburoku Festival. * A shrine in Sukumo Valley, {{ill|Kitanada Town|ja|北灘町}}, {{ill|Naruto City|ja|鳴門市}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県}} - {{ill|Iuga Shrine|ja|伊宇賀神社}}. * A shrine in Nyūgawa, {{ill|Saijō City|ja|西条市}}, {{ill|Ehime Prefecture|ja|愛媛県}}. * A shrine in Nagahama, {{ill|Kōchi City|ja|高知市}}, {{ill|Kōchi Prefecture|ja|高知県}}. * A shrine in Ōmiya, {{ill|Chūō Ward, Fukuoka|ja|大宮 (福岡市)}}, {{ill|Fukuoka City|ja|福岡市}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}}. * A shrine in Ikino Matsubara, {{ill|Nishi Ward, Fukuoka|ja|生の松原 (福岡市)}}, Fukuoka City - Shimoyamato Uga Shrine. * A shrine in Kodabe, {{ill|Sawara Ward, Fukuoka|ja|小田部}}, Fukuoka City - Shōgun Shrine. * A shrine in Koinumaru, {{ill|Yoshitomi Town|ja|吉富町}}, Fukuoka Prefecture - Uga Kibune Shrine.

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]][[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]][[Category:qq]] on (CatAlot)
revision.text:
'''Uga Shrine''' (宇賀神社, うがじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine dedicated to {{ill|Ukanomitama|ja|ウカノミタマ}} (宇迦之御魂神, 倉稲魂命) or {{ill|Ugajin|ja|宇賀神}}.
* A shrine located in Yamamoto, Yamakizaki, {{ill|Imabetsu Town|ja|今別町}}, {{ill|Aomori Prefecture|ja|青森県}}. * A shrine in Miyamoto Kō, {{ill|Tajima|ja|田島}}, {{ill|Minamiaizu Town|ja|南会津町}}, {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|ja|福島県}} - {{ill|Tade Uga Shrine|ja|田出宇賀神社}}. * A shrine in {{ill|Fuma|ja|府馬}}, {{ill|Katori City|ja|香取市}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|ja|千葉県}} - Known for the {{ill|Great Camphor Tree of Fuma|ja|府馬の大クス}}. * A shrine in Iizasa, {{ill|Tako Town|ja|多古町}}, Chiba Prefecture - {{ill|Uga Shrine (Tako Town, Iizasa)|ja|宇賀神社 (多古町飯笹)}}. * A shrine in Nishikoiso, {{ill|Ōiso Town|ja|大磯町}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}. * A shrine on Biwa Island in {{ill|Lake Nojiri|ja|野尻湖}}, {{ill|Shinanomachi|ja|信濃町}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}. * A shrine in Chirihama Town, {{ill|Hakui City|ja|羽咋市}}, {{ill|Ishikawa Prefecture|ja|石川県}}. * A shrine in Higashi Satsuzucho, Higashikujo, {{ill|Minami Ward, Kyoto|ja|南区}}, {{ill|Kyoto City|ja|京都市}}, {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|ja|京都府}}. * A shrine in Kasada Kasaoka, {{ill|Toyonaka Town (Mitoyo)|ja|豊中町}}, {{ill|Mitoyo City|ja|三豊市}}, {{ill|Kagawa Prefecture|ja|香川県}} - Known for the Doburoku Festival. * A shrine in Sukumo Valley, {{ill|Kitanada Town|ja|北灘町}}, {{ill|Naruto City|ja|鳴門市}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県}} - {{ill|Iuga Shrine|ja|伊宇賀神社}}. * A shrine in Nyūgawa, {{ill|Saijō City|ja|西条市}}, {{ill|Ehime Prefecture|ja|愛媛県}}. * A shrine in Nagahama, {{ill|Kōchi City|ja|高知市}}, {{ill|Kōchi Prefecture|ja|高知県}}. * A shrine in Ōmiya, {{ill|Chūō Ward, Fukuoka|ja|大宮 (福岡市)}}, {{ill|Fukuoka City|ja|福岡市}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}}. * A shrine in Ikino Matsubara, {{ill|Nishi Ward, Fukuoka|ja|生の松原 (福岡市)}}, Fukuoka City - Shimoyamato Uga Shrine. * A shrine in Kodabe, {{ill|Sawara Ward, Fukuoka|ja|小田部}}, Fukuoka City - Shōgun Shrine. * A shrine in Koinumaru, {{ill|Yoshitomi Town|ja|吉富町}}, Fukuoka Prefecture - Uga Kibune Shrine.

6 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:宇賀神社 up to rev 98000731
revision.text:
'''宇賀神社'''（うがじんじゃ）は[[ウカノミタマ]]（宇迦之御魂神、倉稲魂命）若しくは[[宇賀神]]を祭神とする神社。 *青森県[[今別町]]山崎山元にある神社 *福島県[[南会津町]]田島宮本甲にある神社 - [[田出宇賀神社]] *千葉県[[香取市]]府馬にある神社 - [[府馬の大クス]]がある。 *千葉県[[多古町]]飯笹にある神社 - [[宇賀神社 (多古町飯笹)]] *神奈川県[[大磯町]]西小磯にある神社 *長野県[[信濃町 (代表的なトピック)|信濃町]][[野尻湖]]の琵琶島にある神社 *石川県[[羽咋市]]千里浜町にある神社 *京都府京都市南区東九条[[札辻通|東札辻町]]にある神社 *香川県[[三豊市]][[豊中町 (香川県)|豊中町]]笠田笠岡にある神社 - どぶろく祭りで知られる。 *徳島県[[鳴門市]][[北灘町宿毛谷]]にある神社 - 伊宇賀神社 *愛媛県[[西条市]][[壬生川町|壬生川]]にある神社 *高知県[[高知市]]長浜にある神社 *福岡県福岡市中央区[[大宮 (福岡市)|大宮]]にある神社 *福岡県福岡市西区[[生の松原 (福岡市)|生の松原]]にある神社 - 下山門宇賀神社 *福岡県福岡市早良区[[小田部]]にある神社 - 将軍神社 *福岡県[[吉富町]]小犬丸にある神社 - 宇賀貴船神社
{{Aimai}} {{デフォルトソート:うかしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[宇賀神社]] to [[Uga Shrine]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import
revision.text:
'''宇賀神社'''（うがじんじゃ）は[[ウカノミタマ]]（宇迦之御魂神、倉稲魂命）若しくは[[宇賀神]]を祭神とする神社。 *青森県[[今別町]]山崎山元にある神社 *福島県[[南会津町]]田島宮本甲にある神社 - [[田出宇賀神社]] *千葉県[[香取市]]府馬にある神社 - [[府馬の大クス]]がある。 *千葉県[[多古町]]飯笹にある神社 - [[宇賀神社 (多古町飯笹)]] *神奈川県[[大磯町]]西小磯にある神社 *長野県[[信濃町 (代表的なトピック)|信濃町]][[野尻湖]]の琵琶島にある神社 *石川県[[羽咋市]]千里浜町にある神社 *京都府京都市南区東九条[[札辻通|東札辻町]]にある神社 *香川県[[三豊市]][[豊中町 (香川県)|豊中町]]笠田笠岡にある神社 - どぶろく祭りで知られる。 *徳島県[[鳴門市]][[北灘町宿毛谷]]にある神社 - 伊宇賀神社 *愛媛県[[西条市]][[壬生川町|壬生川]]にある神社 *高知県[[高知市]]長浜にある神社 *福岡県福岡市中央区[[大宮 (福岡市)|大宮]]にある神社 *福岡県福岡市西区[[生の松原 (福岡市)|生の松原]]にある神社 - 下山門宇賀神社 *福岡県福岡市早良区[[小田部]]にある神社 - 将軍神社 *福岡県[[吉富町]]小犬丸にある神社 - 宇賀貴船神社
{{Aimai}} {{デフォルトソート:うかしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:宇賀神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:31, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Uga Shrine''' (宇賀神社, うがじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine dedicated to [[:en:Ukanomitama|Ukanomitama]] (宇迦之御魂神, 倉稲魂命) or [[:en:Ugajin|Ugajin]].
* A shrine located in Yamamoto, Yamakizaki, [[:en:Imabetsu|Imabetsu Town]], [[:en:Aomori Prefecture|Aomori Prefecture]]. * A shrine in Miyamoto Kō, {{ill|Tajima|ja|田島|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajima|qq=|1=Tajima|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q18989218}}, [[:en:Minamiaizu|Minamiaizu Town]], [[:en:Fukushima Prefecture|Fukushima Prefecture]] - {{ill|Tade Uga Shrine|ja|田出宇賀神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tade Uga Shrine|qq=|1=Tadeuga Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q85882438}}. * A shrine in {{ill|Fuma|ja|府馬|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuma|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, [[:en:Katori, Chiba|Katori City]], [[:en:Chiba Prefecture|Chiba Prefecture]] - Known for the {{ill|Great Camphor Tree of Fuma|ja|府馬の大クス|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Camphor Tree of Fuma|qq=|1=Great Camphor Tree of Fuma|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11486115}}. * A shrine in Iizasa, [[:en:Tako, Chiba|Tako Town]], Chiba Prefecture - {{ill|Uga Shrine (Tako Town, Iizasa)|ja|宇賀神社 (多古町飯笹)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uga Shrine (Tako Town, Iizasa)|qq=}}. * A shrine in Nishikoiso, [[:en:Ōiso|Ōiso Town]], [[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]]. * A shrine on Biwa Island in [[:en:Lake Nojiri|Lake Nojiri]], [[:en:Shinano, Nagano|Shinanomachi]], [[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]]. * A shrine in Chirihama Town, [[:en:Hakui, Ishikawa|Hakui City]], [[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]]. * A shrine in Higashi Satsuzucho, Higashikujo, {{ill|Minami Ward, Kyoto|ja|南区|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minami Ward, Kyoto|qq=|1=Southern District|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q411052}}, [[:en:Kyoto|Kyoto City]], [[:en:Kyoto Prefecture|Kyoto Prefecture]]. * A shrine in Kasada Kasaoka, {{ill|Toyonaka Town (Mitoyo)|ja|豊中町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyonaka Town (Mitoyo)|qq=|1=Toyonaka Town (Mitoyo)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11633270}}, [[:en:Mitoyo, Kagawa|Mitoyo City]], [[:en:Kagawa Prefecture|Kagawa Prefecture]] - Known for the Doburoku Festival. * A shrine in Sukumo Valley, {{ill|Kitanada Town|ja|北灘町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitanada Town|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 北灘村 (徳島県)|1=Kitanada|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11403784}}, [[:en:Naruto, Tokushima|Naruto City]], [[:en:Tokushima Prefecture|Tokushima Prefecture]] - {{ill|Iuga Shrine|ja|伊宇賀神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iuga Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * A shrine in Nyūgawa, [[:en:Saijō, Ehime|Saijō City]], [[:en:Ehime Prefecture|Ehime Prefecture]]. * A shrine in Nagahama, [[:en:Kōchi, Kōchi|Kōchi City]], [[:en:Kōchi Prefecture|Kōchi Prefecture]]. * A shrine in Ōmiya, {{ill|Chūō Ward, Fukuoka|ja|大宮 (福岡市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chūō Ward, Fukuoka|qq=|1=Ōmiya|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q120300389}}, [[:en:Fukuoka|Fukuoka City]], [[:en:Fukuoka Prefecture|Fukuoka Prefecture]]. * A shrine in Ikino Matsubara, {{ill|Nishi Ward, Fukuoka|ja|生の松原 (福岡市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishi Ward, Fukuoka|qq=|1=Ikinomatsubara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q115118040}}, Fukuoka City - Shimoyamato Uga Shrine. * A shrine in Kodabe, {{ill|Sawara Ward, Fukuoka|ja|小田部|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sawara Ward, Fukuoka|qq=|1=Kotabe|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q28683175}}, Fukuoka City - Shōgun Shrine. * A shrine in Koinumaru, [[:en:Yoshitomi, Fukuoka|Yoshitomi Town]], Fukuoka Prefecture - Uga Kibune Shrine.
{{Disambiguation}}
